001package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter;
002
003import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
004import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter;
005
006import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.Timer;
007import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
008
009public class ShooterFirstShotIncrease extends Command {
010    private final Shooter shooter;
011    private final Timer timer;
012
013    public ShooterFirstShotIncrease() {
014        shooter = Shooter.getInstance();
015        timer = new Timer();
016    }
017
018    @Override
019    public void initialize() {
020        timer.restart();
021        shooter.addToBonusVelocity(Settings.Shooter.FIRST_SHOT_BONUS.get());
022    }
023
024    @Override
025    public boolean isFinished() {
026        return timer.hasElapsed(1);
027    }
028
029    @Override
030    public void end(boolean interrupted) {
031        shooter.resetBonusVelocity();
032    }
033}
